title: neottia inayatii
intro: Neottia inayatii, also known as Inayat's tooth-oralia or Inayat's toothed orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Neottia inayatii include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
